PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Feb-20-2024 Continued To Mar-20-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of The Estate
Off Calendar Jan-09-2024 Off Calendar

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-09-2024 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Anne Steele appeared via zoom for and with Farukh Shazad (petitioner).

The Court determined that administration is on track, that an inventory and appraisal was filed, and that it will not issue any suspension at this time. The matter is ordered off calendar.

Visting Judge: Cecilia Castellanos. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Cristobal. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of The Estate
Off Calendar Nov-28-2023 Continued To Jan-09-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Anne Steele appeared via zoom for Farukh Shazad (Petitioner).

Ms. Steele stated that she hasn't had much contact with her client, that there is a decedent's home in Michigan that will be up for sale, and that she will try and contact her client.

An Order to Show Cause will be issued to Farukh Shazad (administrator) to appear on January 09, 2024, at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to show cause as to why he should not be suspended as administrator for failure to file Status of closing the estate. Status on close of estate is also continued to that date.

Judge: Stephen Murphy. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Cabrera. Not reported.
